message:
feat(tui): add Ctrl-d/Ctrl-u half-page scrolling in tree view

Vim users expect Ctrl-d/Ctrl-u for half-page jumps, but these
keybindings were only wired up for non-tree modes. The tree view now
supports both shortcuts when the list pane is focused, scrolling by
half the visible page height with proper boundary clamping.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
